gold_facts: Reads a file path from argv[1]
Parses records with a fixed header
Computes a CRC32 over payload bytes
Rejects malformed records with an error code
Writes a summary line to stdout
side_effects: writes diagnostics to stderr on failure

bugs_or_risks.title: missing length guard before payload access

semantic_diff_points: version B rejects zero-length records while version A accepts them
